items: A progress briefing for Linda Gallegos, Chief Financial Officer
Engagement commenced {{fact:f:E-2008-001.start}}
Presented by Jason Torres, Principal
Prepared by the engagement team for the client's review

blocks.text: What We Were Asked To Do

items: Redesign how the company is organized to run: structure, decision rights, and the cost that structure carries
Diagnose the current operating model from the charts, the management accounts, and the leadership interviews
Design a target model built for where the business is going, not for where it has been
Lay out a roadmap that sequences the change and shows where the return is largest
We start from your own charts and management accounts, not from a template
Brenda Rodriguez leads the cost baseline and the current-state map
Interviews with the business-unit heads run through the on-site weeks
The cost baseline is built by function and by layer, so spend can be read against the structure that drives it
Every number we show you ties back to one your finance team already recognizes
Leaders describe the same decision being made in more than one place, and then reconciled later
The cost of coordinating across the structure shows up as meetings and rework, not as a line on the accounts
Accountability that is clearly held moves work faster than accountability shared across several roles
These are themes from the interviews so far, offered as observations and not yet as findings
Organization charts and management accounts received and reconciled
Cost baseline for Hughes Group built by function; the layer view is in progress
Leadership interviews under way, roughly half complete
Early pattern: decisions and cost do not sit in the same place, and we are testing how far that goes
No target structure is on the table yet, and none should be inferred from this briefing
Finish the interviews and close the cost baseline
Frame two or three target-model options for discussion, not for decision
Bring the diagnostic findings to the next working session
Questions to Jason Torres; data questions direct to Brenda Rodriguez
